name: Cabo Verde Capital Inc.
summary: Cabo Verde Capital Inc. engages in the development, manufacture, and distribution of atmospheric water generators for use in home and office, commercial, industrial, and infrastructure applications in the United States and internationally. Its atmospheric water generators extract water from air and turn it into drinking water. The company's products include AirJuicer 4010, an atmospheric water generator that generates and purifies water from the atmosphere; CI-2500, an atmospheric water generator that produces water depending on the relative humidity of the geographical location; CI-5000, which produces potable water-from-air; WaterProducer Greenhouse that produces drinking water and irrigation water; and WaterWall/WaterProducer, which produces water by condensing moisture from the air. Its installed or mobile unit produces drinking water for the bottling industry, restaurants, emergency/disaster relief, humanitarian initiatives, troop support, and remote camps. The company provides its products online. Cabo Verde Capital Inc. was formerly known as Watair Inc. and changed its name to Cabo Verde Capital Inc. in May 2014. The company was incorporated in 2000 and is based in Spokane, Washington.
